---
title: 周总结-tibble中添加行
author: 桑峰
date: 2023-09-20
categories:
    - 编程
tags: 
  - R
  - tibble
format: hugo-md
---

## Add a new row into a empty tibble in R

There is a simple example below.

```R
library(tidyverse)

a <- tibble()
a <- a %>%
  bind_rows(list(A = 1, B = 2))
```

This is the results:

![A simple example](fig.png)
